29152863.title: Martin Donnelly (civil servant)
29152863.extract: Sir Martin Eugene Donnelly,  (born 4 June 1958) is a British former civil servant. His roles included permanent secretary of the Department for Business, Innovation and Skills (2010–2016), and of the Department for International Trade (2016–2017).
